mapper.sql: SELECT F.LOTNO, ISNULL(F.FAILGUBUN, '') AS FAILGUBUN, F.PARTNO, G.PARTNM, G.STANDARD, ISNULL(F.FAILQTY, 0) AS FAILQTY, F.FAILTYPE, F.FAILBREAKDOWN, F.REGDTM, F.WORKORDNO, F.LINECD, F.PLANTCD, '대기' AS PROCESS_STATUS, ISNULL(F.REMARK, '') AS REMARK FROM TBL_PROD_FAILQTY F LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_GOODS G ON F.PARTNO = G.PARTNO UNION ALL SELECT H.LOTNO, ISNULL(H.FAILGUBUN, '') AS FAILGUBUN, H.PARTNO, G.PARTNM, G.STANDARD, ISNULL(H.FAILQTY, 0) AS FAILQTY, H.FAILTYPE, H.FAILBREAKDOWN, H.REGDTM, H.WORKORDNO, H.LINECD, H.PLANTCD, '처리완료' AS PROCESS_STATUS, ISNULL(H.REMARK, '') AS REMARK FROM TBL_PROD_FAILQTY_HISTORY H LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_GOODS G ON H.PARTNO = G.PARTNO
